---
title: "Projects"
pagetitle: "Projects — Josh Pearlson"
title-block-banner: false
page-layout: full
css:
  - ../css/index.css
  - ../css/projects.css
include-after-body:
  - ../javaScript/terminal.html
---

```{=html}
<div class="jcp-terminal" id="jcp-terminal">
  <div class="t-tabs">
    <a href="/" class="t-tab"><span class="t-tab-indicator">&nbsp;</span>home</a>
    <a href="/about/" class="t-tab"><span class="t-tab-indicator">&nbsp;</span>about</a>
    <a href="/articles/" class="t-tab"><span class="t-tab-indicator">&nbsp;</span>articles</a>
    <a href="/projects/" class="t-tab t-tab-active"><span class="t-tab-indicator">▸</span>projects</a>
    <a href="/contact/" class="t-tab"><span class="t-tab-indicator">&nbsp;</span>contact</a>
    <div class="t-tabs-spacer"></div>
    <div class="t-title" id="t-title">jcp@joshpearlson: ~/projects</div>
  </div>
  <div class="t-body" id="t-body" data-page="other">

    <div class="jcp-h2"># projects</div>

    <div class="jcp-proj-grid">

      <a href="/articles/" class="jcp-proj-card">
        <div class="jcp-proj-meta">
          <span class="jcp-proj-year">2024+</span>
          <span class="jcp-proj-tag">Blog · Writing</span>
        </div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-title"><span class="jcp-proj-arrow">▸</span>Priors</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-desc">Personal blog on markets, ML, and probability.</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-sep"></div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-path">› ./articles/</div>
      </a>

      <a href="https://pomo.joshpearlson.com" class="jcp-proj-card">
        <div class="jcp-proj-meta">
          <span class="jcp-proj-year">2025+</span>
          <span class="jcp-proj-tag">Web app · JS</span>
        </div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-title"><span class="jcp-proj-arrow">▸</span>Pomo</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-desc">Minimal Pomodoro timer. Live at pomo.joshpearlson.com.</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-sep"></div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-path">› pomo.joshpearlson.com</div>
      </a>

      <a href="https://openreview.net/forum?id=sfnz81T3pm" class="jcp-proj-card">
        <div class="jcp-proj-meta">
          <span class="jcp-proj-year">2024</span>
          <span class="jcp-proj-tag">Research · LLM</span>
        </div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-title"><span class="jcp-proj-arrow">▸</span>DPFM @ ICLR 2024</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-desc">LLMs recognizing DeFi entities. Lead author, DPFM workshop @ ICLR 2024.</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-sep"></div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-path">› openreview.net/forum?id=sfnz81T3pm</div>
      </a>

      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1117/12.2582228" class="jcp-proj-card">
        <div class="jcp-proj-meta">
          <span class="jcp-proj-year">2020</span>
          <span class="jcp-proj-tag">Research · CNN</span>
        </div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-title"><span class="jcp-proj-arrow">▸</span>MRI Lesion Mapping</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-desc">CNN-based lesion mapping from MP-MRI. Lead author, SPIE Medical Imaging.</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-sep"></div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-path">› doi.org/10.1117/12.2582228</div>
      </a>

      <a href="6CardGolf/index.html" class="jcp-proj-card">
        <div class="jcp-proj-meta">
          <span class="jcp-proj-year">2023</span>
          <span class="jcp-proj-tag">Card game · P2P</span>
        </div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-title"><span class="jcp-proj-arrow">▸</span>6-Card Golf</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-desc">Browser-based 1v1 card game with P2P networking and in-game chat.</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-sep"></div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-path">› ./projects/6CardGolf</div>
      </a>

      <a href="DigDug/DigDugGame.html" class="jcp-proj-card">
        <div class="jcp-proj-meta">
          <span class="jcp-proj-year">2022</span>
          <span class="jcp-proj-tag">Arcade · Canvas</span>
        </div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-title"><span class="jcp-proj-arrow">▸</span>Dig Dug</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-desc">Classic arcade game recreation in the browser.</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-sep"></div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-path">› ./projects/DigDug</div>
      </a>

    </div>

  </div>
  <div class="t-status">
    <span><span class="t-status-dot">●</span> online</span>
    <span id="t-status-count">— articles · — projects</span>
    <span class="t-status-weather" id="t-status-weather">
      <span class="t-weather-glyph">·</span> NYC --°F <span class="t-sep">·</span> 40.7128° N, 74.0060° W
    </span>
  </div>
</div>
```

      <a href="https://pomo.joshpearlson.com" class="jcp-proj-card">
        <div class="jcp-proj-meta">
          <span class="jcp-proj-year">2025+</span>
          <span class="jcp-proj-tag">Web app · JS</span>
        </div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-title"><span class="jcp-proj-arrow">▸</span>Pomo</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-desc">Minimal Pomodoro timer. Live at pomo.joshpearlson.com.</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-sep"></div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-path">› pomo.joshpearlson.com</div>
      </a>

      <a href="https://openreview.net/forum?id=sfnz81T3pm" class="jcp-proj-card">
        <div class="jcp-proj-meta">
          <span class="jcp-proj-year">2024</span>
          <span class="jcp-proj-tag">Research · LLM</span>
        </div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-title"><span class="jcp-proj-arrow">▸</span>DPFM @ ICLR 2024</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-desc">LLMs recognizing DeFi entities. Lead author, DPFM workshop @ ICLR 2024.</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-sep"></div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-path">› openreview.net/forum?id=sfnz81T3pm</div>
      </a>

      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1117/12.2582228" class="jcp-proj-card">
        <div class="jcp-proj-meta">
          <span class="jcp-proj-year">2020</span>
          <span class="jcp-proj-tag">Research · CNN</span>
        </div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-title"><span class="jcp-proj-arrow">▸</span>MRI Lesion Mapping</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-desc">CNN-based lesion mapping from MP-MRI. Lead author, SPIE Medical Imaging.</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-sep"></div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-path">› doi.org/10.1117/12.2582228</div>
      </a>

      <a href="6CardGolf/index.html" class="jcp-proj-card">
        <div class="jcp-proj-meta">
          <span class="jcp-proj-year">2023</span>
          <span class="jcp-proj-tag">Card game · P2P</span>
        </div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-title"><span class="jcp-proj-arrow">▸</span>6-Card Golf</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-desc">Browser-based 1v1 card game with P2P networking and in-game chat.</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-sep"></div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-path">› ./projects/6CardGolf</div>
      </a>

      <a href="DigDug/DigDugGame.html" class="jcp-proj-card">
        <div class="jcp-proj-meta">
          <span class="jcp-proj-year">2022</span>
          <span class="jcp-proj-tag">Arcade · Canvas</span>
        </div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-title"><span class="jcp-proj-arrow">▸</span>Dig Dug</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-desc">Classic arcade game recreation in the browser.</div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-sep"></div>
        <div class="jcp-proj-path">› ./projects/DigDug</div>
      </a>

    </div>

  </div>
  <div class="t-status">
    <span><span class="t-status-dot">●</span> online</span>
    <span id="t-status-count">— articles · — projects</span>
    <span class="t-status-weather" id="t-status-weather">
      <span class="t-weather-glyph">·</span> NYC --°F <span class="t-sep">·</span> 40.7128° N, 74.0060° W
    </span>
  </div>
</div>
```
